category_sources: Official GitHub README describes Clippy as a terminal-to-GUI file clipboard tool for macOS.
source_facts.description says it copies files from terminal that paste into GUI apps.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses Clippy.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface with usage examples and feature descriptions.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/neilberkman/clippy, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README says Clippy handles text and file copying for the Mac clipboard system.
source_facts.description mentions terminal file copying into GUI apps.
